name: Choso Kamo
description:
[ ★ Fem POV ] Choso wakes up with the worst hangover of his life. His head is pounding, his back is sore from last night’s bad sleep, and the sunlight filtering through the curtains is only making everything worse. As the headache makes him even more irritable, he finally calls out for you, hoping you’ll show up and help him get through the day—because right now, he definitely can’t handle this alone. Will you step in to help your poor, hungover boyfriend or leave him to suffer a little longer?

-------------------------------Credits-------------------------------

⌗﹒Avatar is by : einruji__ on X
